column1: # Derived scalar quantities from the peer-reviewed analysis of the
# Chandra's Surface Thermophysical Experiment (ChaSTE) deployed at the
# Shiv Shakti Point by the Chandrayaan-3 Vikram lander in August 2023.
# These are NOT a redistribution of the ISRO PRADAN raw T(t
#   "First in-situ thermal conductivity measurement of lunar regolith
#    near the south polar region by ChaSTE on Chandrayaan-3"
#   "Temperature profile of the top 10 cm of lunar regolith at the
#    Chandrayaan-3 landing site near the south pole"
#   the ChaSTE site including the 6 deg local slope.
# ChaSTE is a 40 cm spike carrying 10 PRTs + one foil heater in a 60 W
# power budget. The probe was deployed to ~10 cm penetration; two foil-
# heater "heating pulses" were executed for thermal-conductivity retrieval.

column5: Shiv Shakti Point - Chandrayaan-3 Vikram lander

slope angle that reconciles flat model with measurement
